summary: feat(signin): add "Forgot password?" link to the passkey password fallback
description:
Because:
 - Passkey users entering their password on the fallback screen had no reset
   path when they can't recall it. Reset risks Sync data loss, so it is offered
   only as a last resort rather than surfaced up front.

This commit:
 - Shows a "Forgot password?" link on the passkey password-fallback screen only
   after the user exhausts their password attempts (a throttling error), linking
   to the password reset flow.

Closes #FXA-14170
